hooks.statusMessage: Running pre-push checks (cargo fmt, clippy, npm test)...
hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^\s*git\s+push'; then result=0; (cd src-tauri && cargo fmt --check 2>&1) || result=1; (cd src-tauri && cargo clippy -- -D warnings 2>&1) || result=1; npm test 2>&1 || result=1; if [ $result -ne 0 ]; then echo '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "Pre-push checks failed. Fix cargo fmt / clippy / npm test errors first."}'; fi; fi
